stories.headline: Hamas 'systematically' used sexual violence in 7 October attacks, report finds
stories.summary: An Israeli commission's two-year investigation concludes Hamas systematically used sexual violence on 7 October and against hostages it held in Gaza, laying groundwork for prosecution.

stories.headline: ‘No question’ EU funds must not be misused, Estonian minister says
stories.summary: EU ministers met in Brussels this week to discuss how Ukraine could best use the EU’s €90 billion loan to repel Russian forces. Backdropped by a widening corruption scandal in the war-torn country, Estonia's defence minister told Euronews there is 'no question' the money should not be mishandled.

stories.headline: Holed-Up Philippine Senator Courts Support Over Police Standoff

stories.headline: Gilts Become ‘Half-Hour Trade’ on Politics, HSBC’s Kettner Says

stories.headline: Russian cargo ship sunk off Spain carried nuclear reactors for North Korea, probe reveals
stories.summary: Spanish investigators have discovered that the Russian cargo ship that sank in the Mediterranean in 2024 — originally believed to be part of a weapons retrieval mission to Syria — was secretly carrying nuclear reactor components bound for North Korea.

stories.headline: Newsletter: A medley of middle powers
stories.summary: As US President Donald Trump readies himself for a widely anticipated multi-day visit to China, and to be hosted by the country's leader Xi Jinping, the world's middle powers are watching on to see how they can slot themselves into what the summit brings.

stories.headline: Forint Drops After Hungary Central Bank Cuts Rate on FX Swap
stories.summary: The forint weakened after the Hungarian central bank unexpectedly lowered the interest rate on its foreign-currency swaps following one of the biggest emerging-market currency rallies this year.
